description_long: This is an adult male figure with a stocky build, dressed in a horizontally striped polo shirt and knee-length shorts. He wears a backwards baseball cap and has short hair visible beneath it. His wrists are adorned with wristbands, and he is wearing athletic sneakers with visible laces. The figure's arms hang naturally at his sides, and his facial features are neutral. The overall appearance suggests a casual, relaxed urban pedestrian, suitable for everyday street or park environments.
description: A stocky adult male in a striped polo shirt, shorts, sneakers, and a backwards cap, standing in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped shirt, facial features, wristbands, and sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the protruding belly, cap, and profile of the face and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, shorts, cap, and both arms at the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same profile features as the left, with visible wristband and sneaker details.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve polo shirt, knee-length shorts, backwards baseball cap, wristbands
